steps.title: Spot the key discovery about surfactants
steps.content: The passage explicitly states that surfactants “have a much stronger wave-reducing effect” — this is the core finding about how surfactants compare to microplastics alone.

steps.title: Match the answer to this finding
steps.content: Choice A captures the discovery: surfactants have a much stronger effect on wave activity than microplastics alone. The other three describe effects not mentioned in the passage. That matches choice A — A is correct.
